system:
Ban la tro ly migrate ung dung MSSQL sang ERP framework. Nhiem vu: doc body T-SQL cua 1 stored procedure + ket qua parse heuristic, gan ten tieng Viet + tier + mo ta nghiep vu.

Tuan thu **STYLE.md** duoi day (chu y verb prefix + tier guideline):

---

---

Khung dich:
- Tier B: procedure JS chay isolated-vm (128MB/5s). API: db.queryRecords, db.findById, db.tx, entity.insert/update/delete, callTool, callProc, fetch, console.log. KHONG raw SQL.
- Tier C: workflow scheduled — proc chay theo lich (SQL Agent). Body workflow goi xuong tier B/D.
- Tier D: plugin TS in-process — Drizzle sql`` full power, transaction, file system.

Input ban se nhan:
- `procName` — schema.name.
- `body` — T-SQL body (truncate ~6000 char).
- `parseAnalysis` — { readsTables, writesTables, flags, suggestedTier } tu parser heuristic.
- `tablesEnriched` — map ten MSSQL → ten entity tieng Viet (de hieu nghiep vu).

Output JSON object DUY NHAT theo schema:
```json
{
  "originalName": "<schema.proc>",
  "targetProcName": "<snake_case bat dau bang verb, neu tier=B>",
  "targetFile": "<packages/plugins/module-<m>/<name>.ts, neu tier=D>",
  "label": "<tieng Viet co dau ngan>",
  "description": "<1-2 cau noi nghiep vu>",
  "tier": "B" | "C" | "D",
  "tierReason": "<vi sao chon tier nay>",
  "schedule": "<cron expression, chi neu tier=C va detect duoc>"
}
```

Quy tac:
- `targetProcName` BAT BUOC bat dau bang verb (xem STYLE.md muc 3): lay_*, dem_*, tinh_*, tao_*, cap_nhat_*, xoa_*, kiem_tra_*, gui_*, dong_*, mo_*, nhap_*, xuat_*, duyet_*.
- Override `tier` neu thay parser sai (vd CTE chi de readability → B).
- `targetFile` chi can khi tier D — dat trong `packages/plugins/module-<module>/<targetProcName>.ts`.
- `description` noi VIEC GI (nghiep vu) chu khong noi T-SQL lam gi. Vi du tot: "Tinh tong tien cua 1 don hang theo cong thuc don gia * so luong * (1 - chiet khau)." Vi du te: "SELECT total FROM orders WHERE id = @id."

KHONG kem markdown, KHONG giai thich. Chi 1 JSON object.
user:
{"procName":"dbo.sp_jobrelease_get","body":"-- =============================================
-- Author:		<Author,,Name>
-- Create date: <Create Date,,>
-- Description:	<Description,,>
-- =============================================
CREATE PROCEDURE sp_JobRelease_Get
	@LenhSanXuat nvarchar(max),
	@MaPhanXuong nvarchar(50),
	@OrderNumber nvarchar(max),
	@MaSanPham nvarchar(max)
AS
BEGIN
	SELECT *
INTO #temp
  FROM (SELECT null c_joborder_no,
               '0' chk,
               a.c_line,
               a.cust_po_no,
               a.order_number,
               a.i_po_no,
               a.style,
               a.model,
               a.color,
               a.d_plan_s,
               a.d_plan_e,
               a.q_plan,
               b.stt,
               dbo.IFELSE(b.stt, '0', '000', b.mact) mact,
               b.chitiet,
               (DBO.IFELSE (isnull (b.soluong_tc, ''), '', 1, b.soluong_tc)
                * a.q_plan) soluong,
               dbo.getRouting(a.style, b.mact) rout
          FROM       tr_mds a WITH (NOLOCK)
                  INNER JOIN
                     (SELECT masp, stt, mact, chitiet, soluong_tc
                        FROM tr_dinhmuc_govan WITH (NOLOCK)) b
                  ON a.style = b.masp
         WHERE a.lsx = @LenhSanXuat
               --AND c.template IN ('SUBASSEMBLY', 'FINISHED GOOD')
	) a
 WHERE     a.c_line = @MaPhanXuong
       AND a.order_number = @OrderNumber

SELECT a.chk, a.c_joborder_no
	, a.c_line, a.cust_po_no
	, a.order_number, a.i_po_no
	, a.style, a.model, a.color
	, a.d_plan_s, a.d_plan_e
	, a.stt, a.mact, a.chitiet
	, CONCAT(b.dayy_tc, '*', b.rong_tc, '*', b.dai_tc) quycach
	, a.soluong, a.rout
FROM #temp a, tr_dinhmuc_govan b
WHERE a.style = b.masp
	and a.mact = b.mact
ORDER BY a.c_line, a.order_number, a.style, a.stt

END
","parseAnalysis":{"readsTables":["dbo.tr_dinhmuc_govan","dbo.tr_mds"],"writesTables":[],"flags":["has-temp-table"],"suggestedTier":"B"},"tablesEnriched":{"dbo.dqt_pallet_chitiet":"dqt_pallet_chitiet","dbo.dqt_thongke_phoi":"dqt_thongke_phoi","dbo.mes_hoso_donhang":"mes_hoso_donhang","dbo.ps_kehoach_donhang":"ps_kehoach_donhang","dbo.ps_kehoach_donhang_trangthai":"ps_kehoach_donhang_trangthai","dbo.tr_bophan":"tr_bophan","dbo.tr_chitiet_hangtrang":"tr_chitiet_hangtrang","dbo.tr_common":"tr_common","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_donggoi":"tr_dinhmuc_donggoi","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_govan":"tr_dinhmuc_govan","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_hangtrang":"tr_dinhmuc_hangtrang","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_ngukim":"tr_dinhmuc_ngukim","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son":"tr_dinhmuc_son","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son_new":"tr_dinhmuc_son_new","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son_theomau":"tr_dinhmuc_son_theomau","dbo.tr_dondathang":"tr_dondathang","dbo.tr_dondathang_chitiet":"tr_dondathang_chitiet","dbo.tr_gridview_column":"tr_gridview_column","dbo.tr_luutrinh_sanxuat":"tr_luutrinh_sanxuat","dbo.tr_material":"tr_material","dbo.tr_nguyenlieu_gva":"tr_nguyenlieu_gva","dbo.tr_order":"tr_order","dbo.tr_order_detail":"tr_order_detail","dbo.tr_sanpham":"tr_sanpham","dbo.tr_tinhtrang_fsc":"tr_tinhtrang_fsc"}}
